# Water Oak Irrigation

> Licensed irrigation contractor serving the Tampa Bay area. Specializing in sprinkler repair, drainage solutions, irrigation system design & installation, smart controllers, drip irrigation, and well pump service.

Water Oak Irrigation is a fully licensed and insured irrigation company based in Temple Terrace, FL (33617), serving residential and commercial properties across Hillsborough, Pasco, and Polk counties since 2015. Founded and operated by Dan Letbetter.

**Phone:** (813) 499-8485
**Email:** dan@wateroakirrigation.com
**Website:** https://www.wateroakirrigation.com
**Hours:** Mon–Fri 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM | Sat–Sun 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM

**Service Area:** Tampa, Temple Terrace, Westchase, Greater Carrollwood, Lake Magdalene, Odessa, Brandon, Wesley Chapel, Plant City, Lakeland, Hyde Park, Davis Island, New Tampa

**Rating:** 4.8/5 stars (33+ reviews)
**License:** Licensed irrigation contractor, Hillsborough, Pasco, and Polk counties

---

## Services

### Sprinkler Repair & Maintenance
Professional diagnosis and repair of all sprinkler system brands. Same-day service available.
- Broken sprinkler head replacement: $75–$150 per head
- Underground leak detection and repair: $200–$600
- Zone valve replacement: $150–$350
- Controller repair or replacement: $150–$500
- Full seasonal tune-up and maintenance plans available
URL: https://www.wateroakirrigation.com/sprinkler-repair

### Irrigation System Design & Installation
Full-service design and installation for residential and commercial properties with permitting included.
URL: https://www.wateroakirrigation.com/irrigation-design

### Drainage Solutions
Custom French drains, catch basins, and channel drains engineered for Tampa Bay's tropical rain and flooding prevention. Permits handled.
URL: https://www.wateroakirrigation.com/drainage-solutions

### Irrigation Maintenance
Scheduled seasonal tune-ups and year-round maintenance programs to extend system life and ensure proper coverage.
URL: https://www.wateroakirrigation.com/irrigation-maintenance

### Smart Irrigation Controllers
WiFi-enabled, weather-based smart controllers (Rachio and similar brands) with remote monitoring and water savings.
URL: https://www.wateroakirrigation.com/smart-controllers

### Drip Irrigation
Efficient drip systems for gardens, shrubs, and landscaping that save water and reduce runoff.
URL: https://www.wateroakirrigation.com/drip-irrigation

### Well Pump Service
Diagnosis, repair, and replacement of well pumps used for irrigation systems.
URL: https://www.wateroakirrigation.com/well-pump-service

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does sprinkler repair cost in Tampa Bay?**
Broken head replacement: $75–$150. Underground leak repair: $200–$600. Zone valve replacement: $150–$350. Controller repair: $150–$500. Free estimates provided before work begins.

**Do you offer same-day service?**
Yes. We offer same-day response for most emergency sprinkler repairs. Call (813) 499-8485.

**What areas do you serve?**
We serve the greater Tampa Bay area including Tampa, Westchase, Carrollwood, Lake Magdalene, Odessa, Brandon, Wesley Chapel, Plant City, Lakeland, Hyde Park, Davis Island, and New Tampa.

**Are you licensed?**
Yes, fully licensed and insured to work on irrigation systems in Hillsborough, Pasco, and Polk counties.

**Do you service all irrigation brands?**
Yes. We service and repair all brands regardless of who originally installed the system.

**Do you handle permits for drainage work?**
Yes. Most drainage work in Tampa requires permits. We handle all permit acquisition and inspections — this is included in our estimate.

**What's the difference between a French drain and a catch basin?**
French drains redirect subsurface water through a sloped gravel bed and perforated pipe. Catch basins collect surface water and direct it off the property. Both are often used together for complete flood protection.

**Can you help if my yard floods after rain?**
Yes. We diagnose the flooding issue and provide a solution — French drain, sump pump, or catch basin system.
